title: Paul Lucci
compiled_truth: Paul Lucci is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-26 to 2001-08-27), Paul Lucci sent 22 and received 378 emails, totalling 400 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (9), [Dan Hyvl](people/dan-hyvl) (5), [Theresa Staab](people/theresa-staab) (4), [Dan Bump](people/dan-bump) (3), [Mark Whitt](people/mark-whitt) (3). Mailbox folders observed: inbox, personal, to_do_list.
